name: dukandiary
description: Mobile-first textile retail business management system

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
